description.english: Welcome to the orbit, you little space jockey!
You're in for a great start!
Almost a veteran!
You really like to hang around the orbit, eh?
Good job, but there are plenty more...
description.finnish: Hyvää työtä, mutta näitä kyllä riittää.

description.english: Your body count is racking up!
Impressive numbers. Most impressive.
Gee, I thought no one would unlock this!
description.finnish: Hemmetti, en uskonut kenenkään avaavan tätä!

description.english: Okay, someone should award a medal for your efforts!
First of many 10K's, I hope!
You could buy all sorts of things with these...
Oh, how I wish these were Euros...
If you'd swim in these, you'd drown.
Okay, you can stop now.
That was a good run!
Your standing in the leaderboard is getting better.
Cool, but these are still rookie numbers.
Wow, five figures! Congrats!
Your skills have improved.
You're taking the orbit by storm.
Six figures, just like my salary (in my dreams).
description.finnish: Yli sata tonnia! Aivan kuin palkkani (unissani).

description.english: This would buy you a house. In a nice neighborhood.
You're a halfway score millionaire!
That's it, we have a proper millionaire!
Crowning achievement!
Chomp chomp chomp.
Double trouble!
Aggressive expansion.
Thank goodness there aren't any more of these...
description.finnish: Huh, onneksi näitä ei ole yhtään enempää!

description.english: See, that wasn't too hard.
description.finnish: Se on helppoa, kun sen osaa.

description.english: You just passed the survival pre-school!
Survived all the way here. Nice!
Hats off, this took real effort.
description.finnish: Hattua päästä, tämä vaatii jo taitoa.

description.english: Would you look at that! Not everyone gets here.
description.finnish: Aikamoista, kaikki eivät pääse näin pitkälle.

description.english: Things are a bit hectic out there, eh?
description.finnish: Ulkona alkaa olla aika hektistä, vai mitä?

description.english: Now things are really heating up!
description.finnish: Nyt alkaa saunassa olla jo aika lämmin!

description.english: The orbit's a bit crowded, don't you think?
description.finnish: Kiertoradalla alkaa olla jo melkoisesti tunkua.

description.english: Pretty impressed you made it this far.
description.finnish: Aidosti vaikuttavaa, että pääsit tänne saakka.

description.english: Okay, this is seriously impressive!
description.finnish: No niin, tämä on jo oikeastikin melko huikeaa!

description.english: This is not just impressive, this should be impossible.
description.finnish: Ei vain vaikuttavaa, vaan likipitäen mahdotonta.

description.english: Awww, baby's first level-up!
You're off to a greata start!
Your teeth are starting to show.
Nice, let's see those muscles!
Now you're old enough to drive.
description.finnish: Nyt olet riittävän vanha saadaksesi ajokortin.

description.english: You're 25 only once. Enjoy.
How does it feel to reach your thirties?
Welcome to adulthood.
At this point you usually start to lose your hair.
description.finnish: Tässä vaiheessa ihmiselämää hiukset viimeistään katoavat.

description.english: You're almost halfway done.
Congrats, it's the halfway house!
Such power!
You're killing it, literally!
Almost time for retirement!
Seventies are never been this deadly!
description.finnish: Tässä iässä vain harva on yhtä tappava.

description.english: What's up, geezer?
The level cap is looming!
We have a certified veteran here.
Oh, wise one, teach us!
One foot in the grave? I think not!
That's it, you've seen it all.
description.finnish: Se oli siinä, olet nähnyt kaiken.

description.english: Yeeeeeehaaaaaw!
Dash like you mean it.
Can you feel the power?
Phew, that was a close call!
These buddies do come in handy!
Some extra juice, nice!
Yes! A brand new power cell!
description.finnish: Mahtavaa! Mikki edessä ja akut takana.

description.english: Time to overcharge your vessel!
Best things in life are shared.
The more the merrier.
We have a full house!
You're in the core, man!
They'll thank you later.
Their blood is in your hands.
Spend your score sparingly!
Get rid of the extra weight.

displayName.english: Rerolled the shop for the first time

description.english: Let's see if the stuff gets any better.
No more space in your pockets.
Yup, you're armed to the teeth!
A proper Taskmaster in the making
Finished up with your chores. Nice!
These will keep things interesting for sure.
It's good to break the routines from time to time.
description.finnish: Rutiineja on hyvä rikkoa aina silloin tällöin.

description.english: The bigger they get...
Gone fishing.
description.finnish: Tätä petoa on hankala saada koukkuun.

description.english: You're not making firewood out of me!
Try beaming me up now.
Completed Journey.
Collected the last Lore Token.
description.finnish: Kaikki on nyt kirjoissa ja kansissa.

description.english: ...but far from deadly.
You're starting to look intimidating
Should we all be scared?
Way to go, rising in the ladder!
Don't get discouraged, keep up the grind!
Great job toughening up!
You're taking on the world, buddy!
Didn't know you could be this extreme.
description.finnish: En tiennytkään, että olen näin äärimmäinen.

description.english: You're the apex predator.
You paid 20 000 000 for that?
